import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import api from '../api/api'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Recommendations = () => { const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState(null); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [error, setError] = useState(''); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('diet'); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { const fetchRecommendations = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/recommendation'); setRecommendations(response.data); } catch (err) { console.error(err); setError(err.response?.data?.message || 'Failed to fetch recommendations. Ensure profile and risk check are complete.'); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; fetchRecommendations(); }, []); if (loading) { return (
🧠

Generating Your Personalized Plan

AI is analyzing your health data...

); } if (error) { return (
⚠️

Unable to Generate Recommendations

{error}

); } if (!recommendations) return
No recommendations available.
; const { profileSnapshot, recommendations: plan } = recommendations; return (
{/* Hero Header with 3D Effect */}

Your Personalized Health Plan ✨

AI-powered recommendations tailored to your unique health profile

🎯
{/* Stats Card with 3D Depth */}
🎯

Daily Calorie Target

{plan.dailyCalorieTarget}

kcal/day

📊

Body Mass Index

{profileSnapshot.bmi}

BMI Score

❤️

Health Risk Level

{profileSnapshot.risk || 'N/A'}

Current Status

{/* Tab Navigation with 3D Pills */}
{/* Content Cards with Layered 3D Effect */} {activeTab === 'diet' && (
{/* Decorative Background */}
{/* Header with Icon */}
🍎

Diet Plan

Personalized nutrition guidance

{/* Macro Goals with Visual Cards */}

📊 Daily Macro Goals

🥩

Protein

{plan.macroGoal.protein}g

🍞

Carbs

{plan.macroGoal.carbohydrate}g

🥑

Fats

{plan.macroGoal.fat}g

{/* Meal Plan */}

🍽️ Daily Meal Plan

{Object.entries(plan.dietPlan).map(([meal, suggestion], index) => (
{['🌅', '☀️', '🌆', '🌙'][index] || '🍴'}

{meal}

{suggestion}

))}
{/* Diet Notes */}

💡 Important Diet Notes

    {plan.dietNotes.map((note, index) => (
  • ✓ {note}
    • ))}
)} {activeTab === 'workout' && (
{/* Decorative Background */}
{/* Header with Icon */}
🏋️

Workout Plan

Build strength and endurance

{/* Workout Stats */}
🎯

Intensity Level

{plan.workoutPlan.level}

⏱️

Duration

{plan.workoutPlan.duration}

💪

Focus Area

{plan.workoutPlan.focus}

{/* Workout Steps */}

📋 Your Exercise Routine

{plan.workoutPlan.plan.map((step, index) => (
{index + 1}

{step}

))}
)}
); }; export default Recommendations;
